chat_log.content:
I see you're a new user — your profile shows the initial interview hasn't been completed yet.

Before we do anything else, I want to spend about 20 minutes getting an accurate picture of who you are and what you're up against — not the elevator pitch version, the honest one. I'll ask about your background, what you're building, and what typically gets in your way. From that I'll calibrate how I coach you.

There are no right answers. The less polished your answers are, the more useful this will be. Goals come after this — first I want to understand the person.

Let's start with your background.

**What did you do before this?** Not the LinkedIn version — what did the work actually involve, and how long did you do it?
